text: AIS UPDATE: MMSI 563001234, MV PACIFIC TRADER, bulk carrier, flag SGP, position 01°15.3'N 103°52.1'E, SOG 0.2kn, COG 000, draught 12.4m. Vessel stationary at Eastern OPL anchorage for 72+ hours with no port call scheduled. AIS transmission intervals irregular — gaps of 45-90 minutes observed between 0200-0500 local. No matching VMS record from MPA vessel tracking system.
label: ais-spoofing

text: PATROL REPORT: RSS Valiant (P94) observed unlit vessel bearing 045 at 12nm from Horsburgh Lighthouse at 0347H 18MAR2026. Vessel not transmitting AIS. Radar cross-section consistent with 60-80m fishing vessel or small cargo carrier. Vessel proceeded at 8kn on heading 210 toward Indonesian territorial waters. Closest point of approach to TSS was 2.3nm. Attempted VHF contact on Ch16 — no response. Photographed at maximum optical zoom. Images forwarded to MSTC for identification.
label: dark-vessel

text: SIGINT INTERCEPT SUMMARY: Freq 8.291 MHz USB, 0215Z 20MAR2026. Two transmitters exchanging coded voice traffic in Mandarin. Bearing analysis places TX1 at approximately 02°45'N 108°30'E (central South China Sea) and TX2 at coastal site consistent with Hainan Island facilities. Content analysis indicates coordination of rendezvous for at-sea transfer. References to 'cargo documentation' and 'inspection avoidance' suggest sanctions evasion or illicit transshipment activity. Correlates with dark vessel tracks from maritime patrol aircraft P-8 sortie ECHO-41.
label: unauthorized-transshipment

text: AIS UPDATE: MMSI 477998765, MT GOLDEN HARMONY, oil tanker, flag HKG, position 01°02.8'N 103°33.5'E, SOG 14.2kn, COG 315. Vessel deviated from declared route (Singapore to Port Klang via Malacca Strait) — current track places vessel 28nm south of expected route in Indonesian waters. No ISPS-related alerts filed. Last port state inspection at Jurong Port 12MAR2026 — no deficiencies. Cargo manifest indicates 85,000 MT crude petroleum, origin UAE.
label: route-deviation

text: MSTC WATCHKEEPER LOG: MV NORTHERN STAR (IMO 9876543), container vessel, flag LBR, entered Singapore Strait TSS westbound at 0612H. Vessel SOG 22.3kn in zone with 12kn advisory speed limit. Multiple near-miss alerts generated by VTS. Vessel did not respond to speed reduction advisory from VTIS Singapore on VHF Ch73. Port Authority notified. Vessel has three outstanding PSC detentions in APCIS database (Tokyo MOU) over past 18 months. Flag state advisory issued.
label: speed-anomaly
